column1: Review Text

Visited looking for special occasion ornaments for an anniversary celebration and found a beautiful pair of earrings and a matching necklace. The quality was excellent and the price was very reasonable. Staff helped me pair pieces that worked together. Highly recommend.

Visited for the first time during a Jaipur trip and immediately became a fan. The shop has a great energy and the collection of high-quality fashion jewellery is impressive. Every piece I touched felt well made. Bought four items and all have been worn multiple times.

The gold polished jewellery here has a warmth and richness that is hard to find in other imitation shops. The finish is applied with care and lasts beautifully. Bought a complete set for a family wedding and it was admired by many guests. Excellent quality product.

The jewellery at this shop has a premium finish that is rare in this price range. The gold polish is warm and even, and the silver has a clean shine that lasts. I have bought from here multiple times and the quality has always been consistent. Excellent shop.

The staff at this shop makes every visit a pleasure. They are warm, knowledgeable, and genuinely interested in helping you make the right choice. The collection of artificial bridal jewellery is excellent and very well priced. One of the best jewellery shopping experiences.

The Kundan imitation sets here are so beautifully made that even experienced jewellery buyers cannot tell them apart from real Kundan at a glance. The enamel work and stone clarity are excellent. Bought a set for my daughter's wedding and she was overjoyed with it.

The premium finish on every piece at this shop sets it apart from other imitation jewellery stores. The care taken in the final stages of production is evident. Pieces maintain their appearance even after extensive wear. A genuinely superior imitation jewellery shop.

Found some stunning oxidized silver jewellery here that I had been searching for a long time. The quality is much better than what you'd expect at these prices. The shopkeeper explained each piece carefully. Will definitely return for more festive jewellery collection shopping before Diwali.

The artificial bridal jewellery at this shop is beautifully crafted for the modern Indian bride. The pieces are elaborate yet manageable in weight, making them comfortable for long wedding ceremonies. Bought my complete bridal set here and was absolutely satisfied.

Looking for a gift for women in my family for Raksha Bandhan, I visited this shop and found the perfect items. The variety was impressive and the prices were very affordable. The shopkeeper helped me pick age-appropriate pieces for each person. Great service and quality.

Found excellent wholesale prices here for a bulk order I needed for a corporate gifting project. The quality was consistent across all pieces and delivery was prompt. The staff was professional and accommodating throughout the entire process. Highly recommend for bulk buyers.

The antique silver ornaments here are perfect for those who appreciate timeless design. The pieces have a depth and character that modern jewellery often lacks. Bought a pair of earrings and a necklace and each piece feels like it has a story. Beautiful craftsmanship.

The shop has a wonderful range of travel-friendly jewellery that is designed for easy packing and wearing. The pieces are thoughtfully sized and lightweight. Bought a travel set that has been perfect for every trip since. An excellent and practical jewellery collection.

Bought customized silver gifts here for my mother's birthday and she was absolutely delighted. The shop accommodated a special design request and executed it beautifully. The personal touch made the gifts extra special. Outstanding service from a truly professional team.

The collection of lightweight silver jewellery here is perfect for the modern active woman. The pieces are stylish and elegant but do not weigh you down. Bought a necklace and earrings set for daily wear and it has been one of my most-used jewellery sets.

The long-lasting polish on the jewellery here is genuinely impressive. I have pieces that I bought over a year ago that still look as good as new with minimal care. This level of quality is rare in imitation jewellery and is why I keep returning to this shop.

This is one of the best jewellery shops in Johri Bazar without a doubt. The collection of temple jewellery designs caught my eye immediately. Everything is neatly displayed and the prices are clearly marked. Bought a few pieces as a gift for women in my family and they were delighted.

The collection at Shree Rama Jewellers is comprehensive and thoughtfully curated. Whether you need daily wear, festive, or bridal jewellery, the shop has excellent options. Staff is professional and helpful. The overall experience is consistently excellent. Top recommendation.

I have shopped at many jewellery stores across India but few match the quality and service of this shop in Johri Bazar. The handmade pieces have a character and warmth that is rare. Every purchase has been a joy. Will continue to be a loyal customer.

The jewellery at this shop is skin-friendly and safe for extended wear. The materials are good quality and have not caused any issues even for my sensitive skin. Staff was helpful in recommending the safest options. An honest and customer-focused shop. Highly recommend.

This shop has some of the most beautiful oxidized silver jewellery I have seen in Jaipur. The dark finish with silver highlights creates a really striking look. Bought a set of earrings and a necklace and have received countless compliments wearing them.

The traditional Rajasthani jewellery at this store captures the spirit of Rajasthan beautifully. The bold designs and vibrant colors speak to the region's rich cultural heritage. Bought several pieces as authentic souvenirs from my Jaipur visit. Each one is a treasure.

Exploring Johri Bazar silver market is always a joy and this shop is one of the highlights. The staff is friendly, the collection is vast, and the prices are fair. Picked up several pieces of ethnic jewellery and all have been well received. Highly recommend this store.

The bridal makeover jewellery at this shop helped me create a complete look without the stress of visiting multiple stores. The staff has a great eye for coordination and helped me put together pieces that worked perfectly together. An invaluable service for brides.

The ethnic jewellery brand reputation of this shop is well earned. Every piece reflects a deep understanding of Indian jewellery traditions combined with modern sensibility. Bought pieces for a sangeet ceremony and they were perfect for the occasion. Exceptional quality.

This shop stocks some of the most beautiful statement necklaces I have seen in the Jaipur imitation jewellery market. The designs are bold and modern while still maintaining a traditional essence. Perfect for those who want to make a strong fashion statement at events.

The handmade jewellery from this shop has a quality and character that machine-made pieces simply cannot replicate. Every item feels individual and special. Bought pieces for myself and as gifts and all have been deeply appreciated. A truly excellent artisanal jewellery shop.

This shop truly represents the best of the Jaipur imitation jewellery market. The collection is thoughtfully curated, the quality is reliable, and the service is always professional. Have been a regular customer for years and will continue to be. Exceptional shop.

The festive jewellery at this shop is perfect for the wedding season. The designs are elaborate but not overdone. Bought pieces for a wedding ceremony and they added exactly the right amount of elegance to my outfit. Staff was helpful and service was prompt. Great shop.

The temple jewellery designs here are among the most beautiful I have encountered. The gold finish is rich and the detailing is exceptional. Bought a set for a religious occasion and it was absolutely perfect. Every guest commented on the beauty of the jewellery.

The premium finish on the jewellery pieces at this shop is what first caught my attention. Unlike many imitation jewellery stores, the finishing work here is careful and precise. The pieces maintain their appearance well over time. An excellent find in Johri Bazar.

This shop was recommended to me by a local guide and it turned out to be the best jewellery purchase I made during my Jaipur trip. The traditional Rajasthani jewellery is authentic and well crafted. Bought pieces that will be lifelong souvenirs of a wonderful visit.

The handcrafted silver rings at this store are true works of art. Each ring is distinct and the metalwork is precise and beautiful. Bought a set of three and they complement each other perfectly. The shopkeeper explained the making process which added to the experience.

The collection of ethnic jewellery here is a wonderful tribute to India's diverse jewellery traditions. The pieces reflect different regional styles and each one is beautifully made. Bought pieces representing my home state and Rajasthan and love the cultural connection.

The collection of party wear jewellery here changes with the seasons to reflect the latest trends. Every visit reveals new and exciting pieces. Bought a gorgeous set for a New Year party and it was a hit. Staff is friendly and service is always prompt and helpful.

Found this shop through a recommendation from a Jaipur local and it became my favorite jewellery stop of the entire trip. The collection of oxidized silver jewellery is outstanding. Bought three pieces and have worn each one multiple times since returning home.

The shop has a great range of lightweight jewellery that does not compromise on design. Perfect for long events where heavy jewellery becomes uncomfortable. The staff helped me find pieces that were both beautiful and practical. A thoughtful and well-curated collection.

The wholesale prices at this shop make it ideal for small business owners and boutique buyers. The quality is consistently excellent across all price points. Have been a wholesale customer for over a year and every order has met expectations. A very professional operation.

One of the top jewelers in Pink City in my opinion. The range of jewellery available here covers every occasion from casual daily wear to heavy bridal sets. Prices are fair and the staff knows the products well. Always leave here feeling like I got great value.

The artificial bridal jewellery here helps brides achieve a traditional look without the heavy cost and worry of real jewellery. The designs are elaborate and beautiful. My niece bought her complete bridal set here and she looked absolutely stunning on her wedding day.

The Kundan imitation sets here are crafted with attention to detail that rivals real Kundan jewellery. The enamel work and stone placement are precise and beautiful. Bought a complete set for my sister's wedding and it photographed stunningly. Everyone thought it was the real thing.

Visited this shop with high expectations based on a friend's recommendation and was not let down. The festive jewellery collection is beautifully curated with pieces for every festival and celebration. The staff was warm and helpful throughout my visit. Very satisfied customer.

This shop exemplifies what a good jewellery buying experience should be. Great collection, honest pricing, knowledgeable staff, and consistently excellent quality. Have been a customer for over two years and will continue to be. An outstanding jewellery destination in Jaipur.

The shop has some of the most beautiful handmade jewellery Jaipur style I have come across. The traditional craftsmanship combined with thoughtful modern design sensibility creates truly unique pieces. Bought several items and treasure each one. A remarkable shop.

The collection of ethnic jewellery here covers a wonderful range of Indian regional styles. From North Indian Kundan to South Indian temple designs, the variety is impressive. Bought pieces representing different traditions and love the cultural richness of the collection.

The jewellery at this shop is consistently among the best quality imitation pieces I have found anywhere. The attention to detail in the craftsmanship is evident and the pieces last well with proper care. A truly reliable and excellent jewellery shop in Johri Bazar.

This shop has a wonderful collection of lightweight silver jewellery that is perfect for travel. The pieces do not weigh down your luggage and look beautiful when worn. Bought several items for an upcoming trip abroad. The quality is reliable and the prices are honest.

Stopped by while exploring Johri Bazar and discovered this wonderful shop. The selection of traditional Rajasthani jewellery was impressive and the prices were surprisingly affordable. Bought a few pieces as souvenirs and they turned out to be some of my favorite purchases from the trip.

This shop is a wonderful find for anyone exploring the Jaipur imitation jewellery market. The collection is vast, the quality is excellent, and the staff is professional and welcoming. Every visit results in purchases I feel genuinely good about. An excellent destination.

The antique silver ornaments available here are a collector's dream. Each piece has a distinct character and you can see the attention to detail in the craftsmanship. Prices are quite fair for the quality on offer. Found this shop through a friend's recommendation and I'm glad I visited.

Shree Rama Jewellers truly understands what customers want. The collection strikes a perfect balance between traditional and modern, and the pricing is always fair. Have been shopping here for two years and have never left disappointed. A gem of a shop in Johri Bazar.

The artificial bridal jewellery options at this shop cover every style from classic Kundan to modern minimalist designs. Perfect for brides who want flexibility in their jewellery choices. The staff was patient and helped me explore many options before I made my final selection.

The gold polished jewellery here has a wonderful warm tone that photographs beautifully. Bought a set for my engagement shoot and received so many compliments on the pieces. The finish is smooth and the shine lasts longer than similar pieces I have bought elsewhere.

The selection of designer bangles here is absolutely delightful. From plain metal to intricately worked sets, the variety is remarkable. Bought two sets for a family wedding and both received many compliments. The staff helped me choose pieces that matched my outfits perfectly.

The exquisite craftsmanship on the antique silver ornaments here is truly remarkable. You can see the skill and care that goes into each piece. Bought a set for my mother as a birthday gift and she was moved by the beauty of the jewellery. Absolutely worth every rupee.

This is one of the best places for bridal makeover jewellery in Jaipur. The staff understands bridal needs and has a natural eye for what will work for different brides. My friend's complete bridal look was put together here and she looked absolutely stunning.

The antique silver ornaments here have a genuine aged quality that is rarely found in modern shops. Each piece has character and depth. Bought two items for a personal collection and both are treasured. The staff was informative and enthusiastic. A truly special find.

The collection of wedding jewellery at this shop covers every need from the mehendi to the reception. The staff understands bridal fashion and provides excellent guidance. Every piece I bought for my wedding looked beautiful in photographs. A wonderful bridal jewellery shop.

The wedding jewellery shopping experience here is excellent. The staff understands the pressure of bridal preparations and is very patient and helpful. The collection covers every aspect of the bridal look from head to toe. Left feeling confident that I had made the right choices.

I visited this shop while looking for antique silver ornaments for a special collection I am putting together. The variety and quality here surpassed all other shops I visited in Jaipur. The staff was knowledgeable and helped me identify the most authentic looking pieces.

The lightweight silver jewellery at this shop is beautifully designed without sacrificing substance. The pieces look significant but feel comfortable even for all-day wear. Bought a necklace and earrings set for a day-long wedding celebration and it was perfect.

I was looking for affordable luxury jewellery that could pass for expensive pieces and found exactly that here. The gold polished jewellery in particular looks absolutely premium. Staff was helpful in pointing out the best value items. A genuinely excellent shopping stop.

This shop has genuinely excellent customer service. The staff is patient with indecisive buyers like me and never makes you feel rushed. The collection of Polki style jewellery is outstanding. Bought a set after spending over an hour browsing and I love every piece.

My first visit to this shop was for browsing but I ended up buying a complete bridesmaid jewellery set. The coordination of the pieces was perfect and the price was well within budget. The shopkeeper was very helpful and suggested pieces that matched the wedding theme.

The oxidized silver jewellery collection here is outstanding in its variety and quality. From earrings to elaborate necklaces, every piece has the characteristic dark silver finish done beautifully. Bought a complete set and it has become one of my most versatile jewellery collections.

The shop has an excellent range of high-quality fashion jewellery that keeps pace with current trends. New designs arrive regularly and the collection always feels fresh. Bought a contemporary layered necklace set that has become my most-worn jewellery piece. Love this shop.

The premium finish on the gold polished pieces here is truly impressive. The surface is smooth, the color is even, and it lasts well with proper care. Bought several pieces and they have all maintained their appearance over months of use. Great quality product.

The Johri Bazar Jaipur area has many jewellery shops but few match the consistency of this one. Every visit delivers quality products and honest service. The collection of imitation jewellery is always up to date with the latest trends. A reliable and trusted destination.

The authentic silver at this shop gives you confidence in what you are buying. The pieces have proper weight and a clean finish that confirms quality. The staff is transparent and does not try to pass off substandard material. A genuinely honest and reliable shop.

The affordable luxury jewellery here is exactly what modern Indian women need. Beautiful, well-crafted pieces at prices that do not strain the budget. The collection covers every occasion and the staff is always helpful in guiding selections. A truly excellent shop.

The Polki style jewellery at this shop is absolutely gorgeous. The uncut stone aesthetic is very on trend right now and this store has the best collection I have seen in Johri Bazar. Prices are reasonable and the staff is knowledgeable about different jewellery styles.

The festive jewellery collection at this shop is absolutely stunning. The vibrant colors and intricate designs make every piece feel celebratory. Bought sets for the entire family for Diwali and everyone looked beautiful. The prices were very reasonable for the quality offered.

The jewellery at this shop has excellent long-lasting polish that holds up well even with frequent wear. I bought a gold polished set six months ago and it still looks as good as new with minimal care. Great quality at very reasonable prices. A dependable shop.

Visited during a Jaipur heritage walk and this shop was the best find of the day. The collection of traditional Rajasthani jewellery is authentic and beautifully made. The staff was welcoming and informative. Bought pieces that perfectly represent the artistry of the region.

The high-quality fashion jewellery here is clearly crafted with care. Even the budget-friendly pieces have a polished look that holds up well. The shop is small but well organized. Found it easily at Shop No 307 Johri Bazar. Staff was warm and helpful throughout.

Bought an ethnic jewellery set for a Karva Chauth celebration and received so many compliments. The deep red and gold tones of the pieces were perfect for the occasion. Quality held up beautifully throughout the long celebration day. Very happy with this purchase.

Bought travel-friendly jewellery from here specifically for a backpacking trip through Rajasthan. The pieces were lightweight, durable, and looked great against the vibrant Rajasthani backgrounds. Several people I met on the trip asked where I had bought the jewellery.

Visited this shop as part of a Jaipur jewellery tour with friends and it turned out to be everyone's favorite stop. The collection of traditional Rajasthani jewellery is outstanding and prices are very reasonable. All four of us made purchases and we were all very happy.

The Kundan imitation sets at this shop are extraordinary. The detail work is precise and the overall finish is beautiful. Bought a full bridal set including necklace, earrings, tikka, and bangles and every piece was perfect for the wedding day. Absolutely love this shop.

The temple jewellery designs at this store took my breath away. Every piece had intricate detailing that showed real craftsmanship. I picked up a necklace and earring set for a puja ceremony and it looked absolutely divine. Excellent quality at a very reasonable price.

Bought lightweight silver jewellery here specifically for travel and it has been perfect. The pieces pack easily, do not tangle, and look great. Quality has held up after multiple trips. The shop understands what modern travelers need from their jewellery. Very happy.

I came to Jaipur specifically to shop for jewellery and this was my first stop in Johri Bazar. The collection of handcrafted silver rings and necklaces was impressive and fairly priced. Bought more than I planned but have no regrets. An excellent jewellery destination.

The trustworthy service at this shop makes it stand out among all the jewellery stores in Johri Bazar. The staff never misleads you about what you are buying. The authentic silver pieces are clearly labeled and the pricing is fair. An honest and reliable destination.

The temple jewellery designs at this store have an authenticity and artisanal quality that is increasingly rare. Each piece feels like it was made by someone who truly understands and values traditional craft. Bought a set for a pooja and it enhanced the entire ceremony.

This local jewellery store in Jaipur has become a regular stop for me whenever I need fashion jewellery. The collection is updated frequently and there is always something new to discover. The staff greets you warmly and is never pushy. A pleasant shopping experience every time.

The Kundan imitation sets here are crafted with extraordinary attention to detail. The enamel work, stone placement, and overall finish are all excellent. Bought a complete bridal set and the entire look was stunning. Multiple guests inquired about where the jewellery came from.

The variety of designer bangles here is simply outstanding. From plain metal to heavily embellished sets, there is something for every taste and budget. I bought multiple sets and the staff helped me select pieces that would work for both casual and formal occasions.

Jaipur has many jewellery shops but this one stands out for its personal touch. The owner remembered me from a previous visit and offered helpful suggestions based on what I had liked before. That level of customer care is rare. The Polki style jewellery I bought is stunning.

Visited Shop No 307 in Johri Bazar last week and was blown away by the variety of imitation jewellery on display. The staff was patient and helped me pick the right pieces for my sister's wedding. Prices are very reasonable compared to other shops in the area. Highly recommend this place for bridal shopping.

Visited this shop as a first-time buyer in Johri Bazar and was immediately impressed by the quality and variety of the collection. The staff was helpful without being pushy. Left with a beautiful silver jewellery set and will definitely return on my next visit to Jaipur.

This is my favorite jewellery shop in all of Jaipur. The staff is warm, the collection is excellent, and the prices are very fair. Every visit results in beautiful purchases that I cherish. Have been shopping here for years and the quality and service never waver.

The wedding jewellery shopping experience at this store is superb. The staff is patient and has excellent knowledge of what works for different wedding themes and outfits. My sister bought her complete bridal set here and she looked absolutely stunning on her special day.

The daily wear silver chains here are simple, elegant, and durable. Exactly what you need for everyday jewellery. The silver quality is genuine and the chains have maintained their shine for months. Excellent value for money and great service. Will return for more.

The collection of oxidized silver jewellery here covers every possible design preference from simple geometric pieces to elaborate floral designs. All are well made and clearly priced. Bought three pieces across different styles and each one gets regular wear. Great shop.

The oxidized silver jewellery at this shop has a unique aesthetic that stands out from the typical options available in Jaipur. The dark silver finish creates a striking and modern look. Bought a complete set and it has become my most worn jewellery collection.

The shop has some of the most beautiful CZ stone jewellery I have come across in the Johri Bazar area. The stones are brilliant and the settings are secure and well finished. Bought a parure set and have worn it to three weddings with great results. Love this shop.

The special occasion ornaments here are perfect for every important life celebration. The pieces feel meaningful and well-crafted. Bought jewellery for a baby shower and an anniversary and both sets were praised by everyone present. A wonderful jewellery destination.

The collection of traditional Rajasthani jewellery here is among the finest available in Jaipur. The pieces are authentic to the regional tradition and the craftsmanship is excellent. Bought several items as meaningful souvenirs of a wonderful Rajasthan travel experience.

The collection of Polki style jewellery at this shop is among the finest I have seen. The rough stone aesthetic combined with delicate metalwork creates pieces of genuine beauty. Bought a set for a destination wedding and it was perfect for the outdoor ceremony setting.

Shree Rama Jewellers has a wonderful curation of high-quality fashion jewellery that appeals to modern tastes without losing traditional sensibility. Every visit reveals new pieces. The staff is always welcoming and service is consistently excellent. A top-tier shop.

This is definitely one of the best spots for wedding jewellery shopping in Jaipur. The collection covers everything from lightweight daily wear to elaborate bridal sets. Staff is patient and helpful, especially with first-time buyers. The prices are reasonable for the quality offered.

The ethnic jewellery at this shop beautifully captures the essence of traditional Indian aesthetics. Every piece is thoughtfully designed and well crafted. Bought pieces for a traditional family function and they complemented all the outfits perfectly. A reliable and lovely shop.

The 1gm gold jewellery collection here is perfect for gifting. The pieces look expensive and feel well made. Bought a set as a Diwali gift for my sister and she was thrilled. The packaging was presentable and added to the gifting experience. Excellent shop.

The gold polished jewellery at this shop looks incredibly rich and authentic. The color is warm and deep and the finish is smooth. Perfect for special occasions when you want to look your best. Bought a set for a family function and received many compliments on it.

Shopping at this store is a very pleasant experience. The shop is well organized, the staff is knowledgeable, and the prices are honest. Picked up some party wear jewellery for an upcoming event and everything looked fabulous. Will recommend this shop to all my friends in Jaipur.

The collection of temple jewellery designs here honors the classical tradition while remaining accessible to modern buyers. Every piece has genuine devotional quality. Bought a set for a religious ceremony and the pieces added so much to the spiritual atmosphere. Beautiful.

The lightweight silver jewellery here is perfect for those who find heavy jewellery uncomfortable. The pieces are delicate in weight but still substantial in appearance. Bought a necklace and bracelet set and have worn them to multiple events without any discomfort.

The collection of party wear jewellery here is glamorous and well-designed for modern celebrations. The pieces are bold enough to make an impact but not so overdone that they feel costume-like. Bought a complete set for a wedding reception and it was perfect.

The silver jewellery here has a premium finish that sets it apart from the competition. The texture and weight of each piece feels right. Staff was attentive and helped me find pieces that matched my budget. A genuinely pleasant retail jewellery shop experience.

This shop has a fantastic range of ethnic jewellery that celebrates the richness of Indian craft traditions. Every piece tells a story and the quality is consistently excellent. Bought pieces for myself and as gifts and all have been thoroughly appreciated. Highly recommend.

The collection of ethnic jewellery here is a wonderful reflection of India's rich jewellery heritage. Every regional tradition is represented with pieces of genuine quality. Bought multiple items representing different styles and they have become a meaningful part of my collection.

The Polki style jewellery at this shop is among the most beautiful I have seen anywhere. The rough stone aesthetic combined with delicate metalwork creates pieces of genuine beauty. Bought a necklace and it has become one of my most prized possessions. Truly special.

The skin-friendly jewellery at this shop is perfect for people like me who have struggled with metal allergies. The materials are clearly communicated and the staff is helpful in recommending the safest options. Have been wearing their pieces for months without any issues.

Bought a set of designer bangles as a customized silver gift for a friend and the reaction was priceless. The packaging was neat and presentable. The bangles themselves were beautifully crafted. Will definitely come back for more gifting options in the future.

The collection of bridesmaid jewellery sets here is perfectly designed for coordinated group looks. The pieces work together harmoniously while each set has its own individual character. The staff helped me select pieces that matched the wedding color palette perfectly.

Shree Rama Jewellers is a fantastic destination for special occasion ornaments. The collection is curated with special events in mind and every piece feels suited for celebration. Bought pieces for my brother's wedding and the entire family looked wonderful. Highly recommend.

The traditional wear accessories here are perfectly suited for weddings and festivals. I bought some Rajasthani style pieces for my cousin's mehendi ceremony and they complemented her outfit beautifully. Quality was excellent and prices were much lower than expected. Will return.

The handmade jewellery Jaipur tradition is alive and well at this shop. The artisanal quality of the pieces sets them apart from mass-produced alternatives. Bought a set of handcrafted earrings and they are some of the most unique pieces in my collection.

The antique silver ornaments at this shop are perfect for collectors and enthusiasts. The pieces have genuine artisanal quality and each one is unique. Bought three pieces for my collection and was given detailed information about each by the knowledgeable staff. Outstanding shop.

The staff at this shop is exceptionally knowledgeable and genuinely passionate about jewellery. They provided detailed information about every piece I was interested in and offered thoughtful styling suggestions. The service elevated an already excellent shopping experience.

The wedding jewellery shopping experience at this shop is excellent for both the bride and her family. The staff understands the emotional and practical needs of wedding preparations and provides patient, helpful guidance. The collection is outstanding. Highly recommend.

The party wear jewellery here is glamorous and well-made. Perfect for evening events and celebrations. Bought a bold necklace and chandelier earrings for a wedding reception and received endless compliments. The quality is excellent and the price was very reasonable.

This shop has the best range of special occasion ornaments in Johri Bazar. Whether you need pieces for a wedding, a festival, or a formal event, the collection has you covered. Staff is helpful and the prices are very competitive. An excellent and reliable shop.

Really impressed with the customer service at this retail jewellery shop. The staff was attentive without being overwhelming. They helped me find pieces that matched my existing wardrobe. The sterling silver collection in particular is excellent. Will definitely return.

Discovered this shop through a local recommendation while visiting the Johri Bazar silver market. The collection of sterling silver jewellery was expansive and well priced. The staff was knowledgeable and patient. Bought several pieces including daily wear and special occasion items.

This is easily one of the top jewelers in Pink City when it comes to value for money. The collection is extensive, the quality is reliable, and the pricing is honest. Whether you need daily wear or occasion jewellery, this shop has something for you. Highly recommend.

A remarkable shop in the best jewellery market in Jaipur. The collection spans multiple jewellery traditions and styles. Whether you want bold tribal pieces or delicate everyday items, this shop has it all. The staff is helpful and the prices are very competitive.

The collection of latest jewellery trends at this shop is always current. The buyers here clearly follow fashion closely and the collection reflects contemporary styles beautifully. Bought a trendy statement piece that has attracted many compliments. An excellent fashionable shop.

The shop has an impressive range of party wear jewellery that covers every type of party from casual gatherings to formal celebrations. The pieces are glamorous without being flashy. Bought a set for a colleague's wedding reception and received many compliments on it.

The staff here is genuinely passionate about jewellery and it shows in how they help customers. They remember preferences from previous visits and make personalized suggestions. The collection of ethnic jewellery brand pieces is excellent. A truly customer-focused shop.

Highly recommend this shop to anyone visiting Jaipur for jewellery shopping. The collection spans everything from daily wear to heavy occasion jewellery. The customer service is excellent and the prices are transparent. One of my top picks among top jewelers in Pink City.

The handcrafted silver rings at this store have a beautiful individuality. No two pieces are exactly alike which makes each one feel special and personal. Bought a set as a meaningful gift and the recipient was touched by the thought and beauty of the pieces.

Walked in looking for one piece and walked out with a full set because the collection was so captivating. The designer bangles section alone has incredible variety. Staff was helpful and the pricing was reasonable. One of the most enjoyable jewellery shopping experiences I have had.

The CZ stone jewellery at this shop has the clarity and sparkle of much more expensive pieces. The settings are well done and the stones feel secure. Bought earrings and a necklace set for a friend's birthday gift and she was absolutely thrilled with them.

The handmade jewellery available here carries a quality that you rarely find in mass-produced pieces. Each item has a slightly unique character that makes it feel special. Perfect for those who appreciate craftsmanship and want something that stands out from the crowd.

The statement necklaces at this store are absolutely stunning. I wore one to a family event and received so many compliments. The long-lasting polish really holds up even after multiple uses. Affordable luxury jewellery is exactly what this place delivers. Very happy with my purchases.

Bought a gorgeous set of designer bangles here for my sister's wedding anniversary. The craftsmanship was beautiful and the pieces were perfectly packaged. She loved them enormously. This shop has a real talent for pieces that make wonderful gifts. Highly recommend.

This shop really stands out in the Jaipur imitation jewellery market for the quality and variety it offers. The pieces are clearly made with care and the customer service matches the product quality. Have been a regular customer for two years and will continue to be.

Brought my bridesmaids here for jewellery shopping and everyone found pieces they loved. The bridesmaid jewellery sets are well coordinated and come in multiple options to suit different skin tones and outfit colors. Prices are very reasonable for the quality. Great experience.

The collection of ethnic jewellery here is diverse and beautifully curated. The pieces span different Indian regional traditions and each is made with care. Bought items representing different styles and they have become my favorite conversation pieces at events. Beautiful shop.

The oxidized silver jewellery here is some of the finest I have seen in the Jaipur market. The finish is deep and even and the designs are varied and beautiful. Bought a complete set including earrings, necklace, and bangles and have worn it to multiple events.

The bridal makeover jewellery options here are breathtaking. From heavy Kundan sets to lighter Polki style pieces, there is something for every type of bride. My sister bought her entire bridal jewellery collection from here and she looked absolutely stunning on her wedding day.

Shree Rama Jewellers has become my go-to spot in Jaipur imitation jewellery market. The Kundan imitation sets they stock are absolutely gorgeous and very affordable. Staff is knowledgeable and never pushes you to buy. Bought a full bridal set for my cousin and she loved it.

Visited this shop after seeing it recommended online and the reviews did not exaggerate. The collection is genuinely impressive and the prices are honest. The staff was knowledgeable and helped me choose the right pieces without overselling. A very satisfying shopping trip.

The shop has a wonderful selection of daily wear jewellery that is practical and stylish. The silver chains and simple bangles are excellent quality and very affordable. Perfect for building a basic jewellery wardrobe without spending too much. Will buy more on my next visit.

I was introduced to this shop by my mother who has been shopping here for years. Now I understand why she keeps coming back. The collection of traditional Indian jewellery is impressive and prices are very fair. The staff treats you like family. A truly special place.

Looking for special occasion ornaments for a family function, I stumbled upon this gem of a shop in Johri Bazar. The collection was vast and everything was reasonably priced. The staff helped narrow down options based on my budget and occasion. Left feeling very satisfied.

Bought a pair of designer bangles as a customized silver gift for a relative and the presentation was beautiful. The bangles themselves were exquisitely crafted with detailed work. Will definitely return for more special gifts. This shop sets a high standard for quality.

Visited this shop while on a trip to Jaipur and picked up some travel-friendly jewellery that fit perfectly in my bag. The pieces are lightweight and do not tangle. The shopkeeper packed everything carefully. Will definitely order online if they have that option. Great find in Johri Bazar.

Bought a stunning set of handcrafted silver rings here as a special gift. The rings were beautifully made with intricate detailing. Each ring was unique while still coordinating with the others. The recipient was delighted. This shop consistently delivers quality and beauty.

The oxidized silver jewellery collection here is one of the most comprehensive I have seen in Jaipur. The variety of designs and price points makes it accessible to a wide range of customers. Bought a necklace and earring set and love the edgy look it gives.

The sterling silver collection at this shop is impressive in both variety and quality. The pieces range from simple everyday items to more elaborate statement pieces. All are well made and clearly labeled. Bought four items on my last visit and wear them regularly.

The artificial bridal jewellery here is perfect for modern brides who want to look regal without spending a fortune. The designs are traditional and elegant. Bought my entire bridal set from here and the feedback from guests was overwhelmingly positive. Excellent purchase.

This is a trusted jewellery manufacturer in Jaipur that consistently delivers quality products. I have been a customer for three years and every purchase has been satisfying. The collection is updated regularly and the staff always remembers my preferences. Outstanding service.

The skin-friendly material used in the jewellery here makes it suitable for daily wear without worrying about allergies. Even my mother who has sensitive skin was comfortable wearing the pieces. Staff was upfront about the materials. Honest and trustworthy shop.

Visited the shop looking for traditional wear accessories for a classical dance performance. Found exactly what I needed in the temple jewellery section. The pieces were perfectly suited to the stage and looked beautiful under the lights. Excellent quality and great prices.

Shree Rama Jewellers is a name that deserves recognition among the top jewelers in Pink City. The quality, variety, and service all meet a high standard. Whether you are a local or a visitor, this shop delivers an excellent jewellery shopping experience every time.

The silver jewellery wholesalers in Jaipur are many but this shop stands out for quality and service. The pieces are genuine and the pricing is transparent. Placed a bulk order for a retail business and was very satisfied with both the quality and the service received.

The quality of the CZ stone jewellery here exceeds what you would expect at this price point. The settings are secure, the stones are bright, and the overall finish is excellent. Bought a complete parure set and have worn it to multiple formal events with great success.

The shop is neatly organized which makes browsing easy. The collection of imitation jewellery is well displayed and logically arranged. Staff is attentive and helpful. Bought pieces for myself and as gifts and was very satisfied with everything. A well-run jewellery shop.

The staff at this shop went above and beyond to help me find the right pieces for my budget. They showed me multiple options without any pressure and gave honest opinions. The imitation jewellery quality is excellent and the prices are very fair. Great place to shop.

The collection of bridal makeover jewellery at this shop helped me look like royalty on my wedding day. The pieces were bold, beautiful, and perfectly coordinated. The staff understood my vision and helped me find pieces that matched it exactly. A wonderful experience.

This shop has an excellent range of party wear jewellery that is both affordable and stylish. The CZ stone sets are especially popular and I can see why. The pieces sparkle beautifully under light and look much more expensive than they actually are. Great value for money.

My mother has been buying from this shop for years and she swears by the quality. I visited for the first time recently and I understand why. The oxidized silver jewellery collection is particularly impressive. Prices are fair and the staff treats every customer with respect.

Excellent experience shopping at this store. The collection of temple jewellery designs is particularly impressive, with each piece reflecting traditional Indian artistry. Prices are very reasonable and the staff is courteous. Will definitely visit again on my next trip to Jaipur.

Bought a set of sterling silver bangles here that have become my everyday staple. The quality is excellent and the finish has maintained its shine for months. The price was very reasonable for authentic silver. A reliable shop for anyone looking for quality silver jewellery.

Came across this shop while walking through the Johri Bazar silver market and decided to step in. The sterling silver collection on display was impressive. Bought two necklaces and a pair of earrings. The pieces are skin-friendly and have not caused any irritation even after daily use.

Every piece of jewellery I have purchased from this shop has been a hit. The quality speaks for itself and the designs are always on point. The wholesale prices make it possible to buy multiple pieces without breaking the bank. A genuinely excellent jewellery destination.

This shop is perfect for anyone visiting Jaipur and wanting to take home meaningful souvenirs. The handmade jewellery is uniquely Rajasthani and beautifully crafted. Bought pieces for myself and as gifts and everyone was delighted with their Jaipur remembrances.

The antique silver ornaments here have a genuinely aged appearance that is beautifully authentic. The patina and design work together to create pieces that feel like genuine antiques. Bought two pieces for my collection and they are among my most treasured items.

This trusted jewellery manufacturer in Jaipur has been serving customers for years and the experience shows. The quality control is excellent and the collection is thoughtfully curated. Every visit reveals something new and beautiful. One of my absolute favorite jewellery destinations.

The high-quality fashion jewellery here is updated regularly to keep up with current trends. Unlike many shops that stock the same items for years, this one feels fresh every visit. Bought a statement necklace and earring set that I wear to almost every party.

Came across this shop through a travel blog about Johri Bazar and it exceeded all expectations. The collection of imitation jewellery was far more premium than I expected. Bought pieces for myself and as gifts for family. Everything was well received. A hidden gem in Jaipur.

The gold polished jewellery at this shop is the best imitation gold I have found in Jaipur. The color is rich and the finish is smooth. Have bought multiple pieces over two years and all maintain their appearance well. An excellent shop for quality gold-look jewellery.

I have sensitive skin and finding skin-friendly jewellery is always a challenge. This shop was upfront about the materials used and helped me pick pieces that would not cause irritation. The imitation jewellery I bought has been comfortable to wear daily. Very grateful for the honest guidance.

Bought exquisite antique silver ornaments as a housewarming gift and the recipient was absolutely delighted. The pieces have a timeless quality that feels appropriate for a meaningful gift. The shop packaged them beautifully. Excellent service and stunning product quality.

This shop has transformed my understanding of what imitation jewellery can be. The quality and craftsmanship here challenge the notion that imitation means inferior. The pieces are beautiful, durable, and incredibly well priced. A must-visit for any jewellery lover.
